# UC-17.5.13 · Forcepoint Agent Health and Enrollment Coverage (`forcepoint:one`)

> **Criticality:** High &middot; **Difficulty:** Intermediate &middot; **Pillar:** Security &middot; **Type:** Availability, Configuration &middot; **Status:** Verified

*We use network security tools to watch who accesses what, help prevent data leaks, enforce network isolation, and secure cloud and remote access.*

---

## Description

Agents off-patch or offline bypass web and DLP controls at the endpoint.

## Value

Endpoint teams hit coverage SLAs before audits.

## Implementation

Install the Insights SIEM app, configure HEC inputs per product line, and align indexes (`proxy`, `email`, `dlp`, `sase`). Normalize usernames to enterprise SAMAccountName.

## SPL

```spl
index=sase sourcetype="forcepoint:one" earliest=-4h
| where match(lower(event_type),"(?i)agent|endpoint")
| stats latest(status) as st latest(_time) as seen by hostname, agent_version
| where st!="healthy" OR seen < relative_time(now(),"-2h")
| sort seen
```

## CIM SPL

```spl
| tstats `summariesonly` count
  from datamodel=Email.Email
  by Email.user, Email.action, Email.src, Email.dest span=1h
| sort - count
```

## Visualization

Single value (coverage %), table.

## Known False Positives

Spikes from new SaaS rollouts, automated workflows, sanctioned bulk uploads, or M&A integration.

## References

- [Splunkbase — Forcepoint Insights SIEM App](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/8053)
